text: Demographics: Mumbai, Maharashtra. Population: 1.24 crore. Density: 20,634/sq km. 100% urban. Religion: Hindu 65.9%, Muslim 20.7%, Buddhist 5.2%, Christian 3.3%. Languages: Marathi, Hindi, Gujarati, English. Sex Ratio: 832.
Demographics: Delhi NCT. Population: 1.67 crore. Density: 11,297/sq km. 97.5% urban. Hindu 81.7%, Muslim 12.9%, Sikh 3.4%. Languages: Hindi, Urdu, Punjabi, English. Sex Ratio: 868. Literacy: 86.2%.

Demographics: Kolkata, West Bengal. Population: 44.97 lakh. Density: 24,000/sq km (highest in India). 100% urban. Hindu 76.5%, Muslim 20.6%. Languages: Bengali, Hindi, Urdu, English. Sex Ratio: 899. Literacy: 87.1%.

Demographics: Chennai, Tamil Nadu. Population: 46.47 lakh. Density: 26,903/sq km. 100% urban. Hindu 81.3%, Christian 7.7%, Muslim 9.5%. Languages: Tamil, English, Telugu. Sex Ratio: 989. Literacy: 90.2%.

Demographics: Prayagraj (Allahabad), UP. Population: 59.59 lakh. Density: 1,087/sq km. Urban: 22.7%. Hindu 80.1%, Muslim 19.1%. Triveni Sangam — Maha Kumbh Mela 2025 (45 crore visitors). University of Allahabad.

Demographics: Ahmedabad, Gujarat. Population: 72.08 lakh. Density: 890/sq km. Urban: 72.4%. Hindu 81.4%, Muslim 13.5%, Jain 3.2%. Languages: Gujarati, Hindi. UNESCO Heritage City. Textile and pharma hub.
